name: Stickman Street Fight
description: Stickman: Street battle is a rather unusual fighting game in which control is carried out with only two buttons. To pass the level you need to kill all opponents by simply pressing the hit button in time. In between fights, you can improve the main character and his abilities.
instructions: To pass the level you need to kill all opponents by simply pressing the hit button in time
tags: Action, Adventure, Arcade, Fight, Fighting, HTML, HTML5, Hypercasual, Kill, Killing, Stickman, Super, Superhero
